usage: set_reinforce_pg_mode [-help] [-reset] [-auto_ir_fix_effort {low|medium|high}] [-critical_path_slack <value>] [-irdrop_hierarchical_block {block1 block2 ... | *}] [-irdrop_hierarchical_top_rail_analysis_directory {directory}] [-respect_defined_nets {file_name}] [-respect_routes {none|fixed|fixed_and_clock|all}] [-respect_stdcell_geometry {none|sequential|all}] [ -timing_aware_effort { none | low | medium | high }]

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -auto_ir_fix_effort
options.description: Specifies the IR fixing effort level during stripe generation.

options.name: -critical_path_slack
options.description: Specifies a slack threshold, in nanoseconds, for critical nets during timing-driven reinforce_pg.

options.name: -irdrop_hierarchical_block
options.description: {block1 block2 ... | *} Specifies hierarchical blocks to fix irdrop.

options.name: -irdrop_hierarchical_top_rail_analysis_directory
options.description: {directory} Specifies the directory of rail analysis information of full chip for hierarchical blocks to fix irdrop.

options.name: -respect_defined_nets
options.description: Specifies reinforce_pg to respect user defined nets in file.

options.name: -respect_routes
options.description: {none|fixed|fixed_and_clock|all} Specifies whether to honor pre-existing routes check during stripe generation

options.name: -respect_stdcell_geometry
options.description: {none|sequential|all} Specifies the cell type to be respected in via generation.

options.name: -timing_aware_effort
options.description: {none|low|medium|high} Specifies the timing effort level during timing-driven reinforce_pg.
